title: Aster lingii
taxonomy: Aster lingii belongs to the family Asteraceae. This family is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Aster lingii is further classified as being in the genus Aster, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Aster is native to the Northern Hemisphere, primarily found in Asia and North America. Aster lingii is a species of flowering plant within this genus and family.

intro: Aster lingii, also known as Mountain Aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The health benefits of Aster lingii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
